creator: tsfbsdport@tspi.at
text: Sorry for the inconvenience this is my first try of a contribution to the FreeBSD ports tree. I've tried to address all comments with a new version of the shar, tried a build on a clean system (should work now) and modified the port to not require any GIDs. Just one question (if this is allowed on this bugtracker) - if a port requires a GID should one also propose a patch for /usr/ports/GIDs or is this auto generated from somewhere elese?
